buttons.primary: bg-teal-600 hover:bg-teal-700 text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.booking_widget: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] p-6 sticky top-24 z-10

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-teal-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.amenity: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:ring-offset-2 text-slate-950

hero_gallery.structure: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 grid-rows-2 gap-2 h-[50vh] min-h-[400px] max-h-[600px] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden

amenities.item: flex items-center gap-3 text-slate-700 py-2 border-b border-slate-50 last:border-0

hero.alt: Infinity pool at sunset ground level view

interior.alt: Modern tropical bedroom with forest view

instructions_to_main_agent: Verify the path of the listing page. It is likely located at /app/app/listings/[id]/page.js or /app/src/app/listings/[id]/page.js.
Do NOT delete existing functionality. Wrap the new design around the existing logic.
Use Shadcn UI components for the DatePicker (Calendar), Select, and Dialog (for photo modal).
Ensure the booking widget is sticky on desktop but static on mobile.
Implement the photo gallery using a CSS Grid. The first image should span 2 rows and 2 columns on desktop.
Use lucide-react for all icons (Star, MapPin, Wifi, etc).
For the map, use a placeholder div with a gray background and a 'Map View' button if no map library is installed.
Maintain the Teal (#0d9488) brand color for the primary Booking button.
Use the provided image URLs for the gallery to demonstrate the premium look.
universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing (padding/margin) than typical designs.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Ensure text contrast is high (Slate-600/900 for text, Teal-600 for primary actions).
Never use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical grids.
Add subtle hover effects to all cards and buttons (lift, shadow, color shift).
